About.title: Banyere OBIGBO
About.missionText: OBIGBO bụ ụlọ dijitalụ maka ọha Igbo n'ụwa nile. Anyị na-ejikọta ndị Igbo n'ụwa nile, na-echebe ihe nketa omenala anyị dị ịma aka n'oge anyị na-ewu ihe nkwado n'oge gara aga na ebe dị iche iche.
About.visionText: Ụwa nke onye Igbo ọ bụla, n'ebe ọ bụla ọ nọ, nọ njikọ na mgbọrọgwụ ya ma nwee ike site n'obodo ya.
About.cultureText: Ndị Igbo bụ otu n'ime ìgwè ụyọkọ ndị obi ukwuu n'Afrịka, nwee ndị diaspora dị mma gbasara kontinent ọ bụla. OBIGBO na-akpakọta anyị na ebe na-asọpụrụ asụsụ anyị, omenala, na uru anyị nkpa n'obodo, azụmahịa, na ọnọdụ.
About.foundingText: OBIGBO pụtara site n'ihe ọchọchọ dị mfe: n'oge ndị Igbo na-eto eto n'onwe ha n'ụwa nile, anyị enweghị ebe dijitalụ nke anyị iji jikọọ, kesaa, ma too ọnụ dị ka obodo. Ọlọlọ a bụ nzaghachi anyị n'mkpa ahụ.
About.ctaText: Bụrụ akụkụ nke netwọk Igbo na-eto eto na-ejikọta, na-ekesa, na-echebe omenala anyị ọnụ.

deleteAccount.heading: Hichapụ Akanta m
deleteAccount.description: Ozugbo ị malite ihichapụ akanta, ị nwere ụbọchị 30 ịkagbuo. Mgbe ụbọchị 30 gasịrị, a ga-emezigharịpụ data nkeonwe gị niile kpamkpam.
deleteAccount.confirmTitle: Ị na-arọ ajụjụ ma ọ bụrụ na ị chọọ ihichapụ akanta gị?
deleteAccount.confirmDescription: Nke a ga-atọ akanta gị maka ihichapụ. Ị ga-enweta email nwere njikọ ikagbuo dị maka ụbọchị 30. Mgbe ụbọchị 30 gasịrị, a ga-emezigharịpụ data nkeonwe gị kpamkpam.

SEO.siteDescription: A digital home connecting the global Igbo community. Discover articles, events, and connect with Igbo people worldwide.
SEO.splashTitle: OBIGBO - Welcome Home | Igbo Community Platform
SEO.splashDescription: Join the global Igbo community. Connect with Igbo people worldwide, discover cultural content, attend events, and preserve our heritage together.
SEO.aboutDescription: Learn about OBIGBO's mission to connect the global Igbo community, preserve cultural heritage, and build bridges across generations.
SEO.articlesDescription: Discover stories, insights, and cultural perspectives from the global Igbo community on OBIGBO.
SEO.eventsDescription: Find upcoming events, gatherings, and celebrations from the Igbo community worldwide on OBIGBO.
SEO.blogDescription: Read the latest stories and updates from the global Igbo community on OBIGBO.
SEO.applyDescription: Apply to join the OBIGBO community and connect with Igbo people worldwide.
SEO.termsDescription: Terms of service for the OBIGBO Igbo Community Platform.
SEO.privacyDescription: Privacy policy for the OBIGBO Igbo Community Platform.
